notes.title: Organization
notes.content: Hilton Franchise Holding LLC is a Delaware LLC formed September 12, 2007. Wholly owned subsidiary of Hilton Domestic Operating Company Inc., whose equity is indirectly held by Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. Franchisor of all Hilton brands within US, US territories, and Thailand (for contracts post-October 24, 2007). Licenses IP (brand names, trademarks, service marks) from wholly owned Hilton affiliate on royalty-free basis, then sublicenses to third-party hotel owners under long-term franchise contracts.

notes.title: Basis of Presentation and Summary of Significant Accounting Policies

revenue_recognition.franchise_royalty_fees: Based on percentage of hotel monthly gross room revenue. Variable consideration recognized as services provided using time as measure of progress. Sales-based royalty fees recognized as hotel room sales occur.
revenue_recognition.franchise_sales_coo_fees: Fixed fees collected upfront; recognized over contract term. Includes application, initiation, and other fees for new entries, COO, or extensions.
revenue_recognition.franchise_termination_fees: Recognized in period payment received due to no further service and collection uncertainty.
revenue_recognition.incentives: Consideration paid to incentivize hotel owners amortized over contract life (including extension periods at franchisor's sole option) as reduction to royalty fees.

content.accounts_receivable: Amounts due from hotel owners. Allowance for credit losses based on historical collection, instrument nature, and business conditions.
content.financing_receivables: Loans to certain franchised hotel owners. Allowance for credit losses provided.
content.franchise_contracts: Capitalized incentive payments and incremental contract acquisition costs. Amortized straight-line over estimated useful life (contract term, 10-20 years). Amortization begins on hotel opening date or contract execution, whichever is later. Impairment tested when indicators exist.
content.franchise_deposits: Application fees collected; recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues.
content.contract_liabilities: Non-refundable advance consideration from hotel owners; recognized over contract term as deferred revenues.
content.fair_value: Three-tier hierarchy (Level 1/2/3). Fair values of financial assets/liabilities estimated equal to carrying values.
content.acquisitions: Business combination vs. asset acquisition assessment. Asset acquisitions: cost allocated to assets/liabilities based on relative fair values; no goodwill recognized.

notes.title: Acquisition
notes.content: In May 2024, completed acquisition of Graduate franchise contracts as part of larger Hilton acquisition of Graduate brand. Accounted for as asset acquisition. Recorded franchise contract intangible assets at cost of approximately $85 million. Amortized over estimated 15-year useful life. Activity not material to 2024 operating results.

notes.title: Fair Value Measurements
notes.content: Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated equal to carrying values as of December 31, 2024 and 2023.

notes.title: Income Taxes
notes.content: Certain US territories require taxation of franchise licensing payments. Franchisee responsible for withholding/remittance. No US income tax provision — entity is disregarded for US tax; all items included in Hilton's taxable income. Foreign tax expense: $412K (2024), $128K (2023), $70K (2022).

notes.title: Commitments and Contingencies
notes.content: Certain Hilton debt obligations maturing 2025-2033 are unconditionally and irrevocably guaranteed by certain wholly owned material domestic subsidiaries, including this entity. All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral. No guarantee liability recorded due to parent-subsidiary relationship. Routine litigation not expected to be material.

notes.title: Related Party Transactions
notes.content: Intercompany balances with Hilton affiliates from centralized cash management. Franchise deposits collected by affiliates into lockbox. Settlements: $1.5B (2024), $1.4B (2023), $1.55B (2022) of other receivables with simultaneous distributions to Parent. Graduate acquisition payment made by affiliate — short-term note payable recorded, settled February 2024 with interest. Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate — no compensation provided in 2022-2024.

notes.title: Subsequent Events
notes.content: Events evaluated through March 18, 2024 (likely typo — should be March 18, 2025 given March 30, 2025 issuance date). No subsequent events disclosed.

accounting_policies_summary.revenue_recognition: Variable consideration (royalty fees) recognized as services provided. Fixed fees recognized over contract term.
accounting_policies_summary.depreciation_amortization: Franchise contracts amortized straight-line over 10-20 year estimated useful lives. Graduate intangibles over 15 years.
accounting_policies_summary.impairment: Franchise contracts tested for impairment when indicators exist (undiscounted cash flow test, then fair value if carrying value not recoverable).
accounting_policies_summary.income_tax: Disregarded entity; no US income tax provision. Foreign taxes on territorial franchise licensing.
accounting_policies_summary.lease_accounting: Not applicable — entity does not hold significant leases.
accounting_policies_summary.related_party: Significant intercompany balances and distributions ($1.5B/year). Operator agreement at zero compensation.
accounting_policies_summary.advertising_fund: Monthly Program Fee (4% GRR) not separately accounted for in these financial statements.
